title: 10 best herbal teas for dehydration
description: Rosa rugosa, also known as beach rose, teas helps with dehydration because it contains high levels of vitamins, minerals, and electrolytes. The tea's hydrating properties are largely attributed to its rich content of potassium, magnesium, and calcium, which help to replenish fluids and electrolytes in the body.
